/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/WIT SWORN:SFPD OFFICER ANTONIO BALINGIT/EXHMA:PEOPLE'S 1- 8 AND HALF BY 11 PHOTO OF A KNIFE/EXHMA:DEFENSE A- PHOTO OF A BUILDING/EXHMA:DEFENSE B- PHOTO OF A BUILDING/EXHMA:DEFENSE C- BLACK AND WHITE PHOTO OF A SKYLIGHT/EXHMA:DEFENSE D- BLACK AND WHITE PHOTO OF A SKYLIGHT/EXHMA:DEFENSE E- BLACK AND WHITE PHOTO OF A SKYLIGHT/EXHMA:DEFENSE F-BLACK AND WHITE PHOTO OF A SKYLIGHT/X: EXHIBITS RETURNED TO OFFERING PARTY/WIT SWORN:SFPD OFFICER CHRISTOPHER WOON/EXHM: PEOPLE'S 2 INSPECTOR'S CRON/X:THE COURT FINDS THERE IS INSUFFICIENT EVIDENCE FOR A HOLDING ORDER ONCOUNTS 1 AND 2 AS CHARGED 459 OF THE PENAL CODE IN THE FIRST DEGREE A FELONY BUT DOES FIND THERE IS SUFFICIENT EVIDENCE FOR A HOLDING ORDER AS TO AN ATTEMPTED 459 OF THE PENAL CODE A FELONY,/871D:1 AND 2 459 OF THE PENAL CODE IN THE FIRST DEGREE/X: FURTHER THE COURT FINDS THERE IS INSUFFICIENT EVIDENCE FOR A FINDING ASTO THE ALLEGATIONS IN COUNTS 1 AND 2 OF  THE FELONY COMPLAINT 667,5(C)(21)PC/HTA1:1, 2 AS CHARGED 664-459PC A FELONY IN THE 1STDEGREE AND 3/X: THE COURT CERTIFIES COUNTS 4,5 AND 6 TO THE SUPERIOR COURT,/BAIL:150000/DEFTCUST3/SHERCOM1/CONTD: ARRAIGNMENT 10-19-12 IN DEPT 22/DOP/
